faq.question: What areas does Nestora specialize in?
faq.answer: Nestora specializes in premium residential properties across major metropolitan areas including Beverly Hills, Miami, Manhattan, Aspen, and the Hamptons. We focus on luxury homes, penthouses, estates, and exclusive investment properties.

faq.question: How does the property buying process work with Nestora?
faq.answer: Our process begins with a personalized consultation to understand your needs and preferences. We then curate a selection of properties, arrange private viewings, handle all negotiations, and guide you through closing. Our team manages every detail so you can focus on choosing your perfect home.

faq.question: Do you offer property management services for investors?
faq.answer: Yes, we provide comprehensive property management services including tenant screening, rent collection, maintenance coordination, financial reporting, and regular property inspections. Our goal is to maximize your investment returns while minimizing your involvement in day-to-day operations.

faq.question: What sets Nestora apart from other real estate agencies?
faq.answer: Nestora combines deep market expertise with a client-first approach. Our team has over 10 years of experience, a 98% client satisfaction rate, and access to exclusive off-market listings. We prioritize long-term relationships and provide personalized service that goes beyond the transaction.

faq.question: Can Nestora help with real estate investment consulting?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Our consulting team analyzes market trends, identifies high-potential investment opportunities, and provides detailed financial projections. Whether you are a first-time investor or expanding your portfolio, we offer strategic guidance tailored to your financial goals and risk tolerance.
